description: This file defines dependencies for a FastAPI application, including database connection handling and user authentication based on JWT tokens.

classes.name: Depends
classes.description: FastAPI dependency injection class used to declare dependencies

classes.name: OAuth2PasswordBearer
classes.description: FastAPI security class for OAuth2 password-based authentication

methods.name: get_conn()
methods.description: FastAPI dependency that yields a database connection.

methods.name: Dict[str,Any] get_current_user(conn=Depends(get_conn), token: str = Depends(oauth2_scheme))
methods.description: FastAPI dependency that retrieves the current authenticated user, decoding the provided OAuth2 token and validating the user.

ctags.name: get_current_user
ctags.pattern: /^def get_current_user(conn=Depends(get_conn), token: str = Depends(oauth2_scheme)) -> Dict[str, A/
